text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Agnes Digital perusing<n>an
Umamusume magazine.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hooooo, that hits the spot... There's<n>only one cure
to ease exhaustion, and<n>that's my oshis!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...But honestly, what I really want is to<n>run in more
races and see more and<n>more Umas!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: But my body just can't keep up...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: No... Stand up! Stand up, Digitan! Ifit's for our precious Umas, I know wecan do it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
We've definitely got this! We can do<n>anything if
it's for our oshis!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She seems to be feeling worn out. I<n>should
probably adjust her race<n>schedule.
